tasks.subject: Task 1: EDC implementation (ECMA-130 §14.3)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure-Go 32-bit CRC for Mode 1 sectors per ECMA-130 §14.3.

**Files:** edc.go, edc_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestEDC' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["edc.go","edc_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestEDC -v","acceptanceCriteria":["LBA-0 EDC matches pinned value","edcTable sha256 matches constant","init self-test panics on mismatch"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ECC implementation (ECMA-130 §14.5/14.6 + Annex A)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure-Go RSPC over GF(256). Computes 276 bytes of P+Q parity for Mode 1 sectors.

**Files:** ecc.go, ecc_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestECC|TestGF' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["ecc.go","ecc_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestECC|TestGF' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["GF table invariants","GF table sha256","LBA-0 ECC sha256","LBA-0 full sector sha256"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Smarter builder pregap/leadout + LBAToBCDMSF
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Builder emits proper Mode 1 zero pregap/leadout; lockstep extends across whole disc.

**Files:** layout.go, layout_test.go, builder.go, builder_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestBuilder|TestLBAMSF|TestGenerateMode1' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["layout.go","layout_test.go","builder.go","builder_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestBuilder|TestLBAMSF|TestGenerateMode1' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["LBAToBCDMSF round-trips","generateMode1ZeroSector(0) sha matches","clean round-trip still works","extended lockstep covers full disc"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Structured delta format (delta.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Byte-keyed override list with EncodeDelta and ApplyDelta.

**Files:** delta.go, delta_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestDelta -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["delta.go","delta_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestDelta -v","acceptanceCriteria":["empty diff is 4 bytes","single byte override","coalescing","non-adjacent separated","apply round-trip","truncated rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: BuildEpsilonHatAndDelta + Pack/Unpack rewire + container v2
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Combine ε̂ build and delta encoding in one pass; switch unpack to ApplyDelta; bump container version to 0x02.

**Files:** builder.go, builder_test.go, manifest.go, manifest_test.go, pack.go, pack_test.go, unpack.go, unpack_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestBuilder|TestPack|TestUnpack|TestContainer' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["builder.go","builder_test.go","manifest.go","manifest_test.go","pack.go","pack_test.go","unpack.go","unpack_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestBuilder|TestPack|TestUnpack|TestContainer' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["combined function produces both","v0.2 container","unpack byte-equal","v1 rejected","clean miniscram <1 KiB"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Drop xdelta3, os/exec, renumber exit codes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove xdelta3.go, ensureXDelta3 helper, os/exec import everywhere. Renumber exit codes; drop REQUIRES from --help.

**Files:** main.go, main_test.go, help.go, e2e_redump_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test ./... && go build ./... && ./miniscram --help`

```json:metadata
{"files":["main.go","main_test.go","help.go","e2e_redump_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test ./... && go build ./... && ./miniscram --help","acceptanceCriteria":["no os/exec in source","no xdelta3 in source","--help no REQUIRES","tests pass","exit codes contiguous"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Update Deus Ex e2e test for v0.2 size
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tighten e2e test: delta < 1024 bytes, .miniscram < 2 KiB. Add EDC/ECC cross-validation.

**Files:** e2e_redump_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -tags redump_data -run TestE2EDeusEx -timeout 10m -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["e2e_redump_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -tags redump_data -run 'TestE2EDeusEx|TestEDCAndECCAgainstDeusEx' -timeout 10m -v","acceptanceCriteria":["delta < 1024","container < 2 KiB","byte-equal recovery","EDC/ECC validate vs real sectors"]}
```
